title: TrendingTopic
description: Defines a trending news topic returned by the Bing News Trending Topics API.

name.description: The title of the trending topic.

isBreakingNews.description: If true, the topic is considered breaking news.

query.description: A search query term that returns this trending topic.

text.description: A query string that returns the trending topic.

newsSearchUrl.description: A URL to the Bing News search results for the search query term.

webSearchUrl.description: A URL to the Bing search results for the search query term.

image.description: A link to a related image. The Image object contains only the url and provider fields.

provider.description: A list of owners of the image.

name.description: The name of the image provider.
